blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,941 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
